branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Einstein-equation source residual / GR emergence diagnostic; T_00, G_00, Lambda_t are matter-side / source-side per P4 manuscript

caveat: This is an algebraic consequence of C1 closure, not a first-principles derivation of why the diagonal-only closure should be picked up by the per-direction Galerkin Lambda_t fit. The interpretation that alpha_xi^2 + gamma^2 captures the diagonal Pythagorean sum while 2*alpha_xi*gamma spreads into off-diagonal shear remains a phenomenological reading until a Hilbert-variation derivation is constructed.
